name: Chili#4
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green or red pepper, finely chopped
16 ounces kidney beans, canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and cut the kidney beans into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a heavy pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Crumble the meat into the pot and cook until no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove the cooked meat with a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add the chopped onion and pepper to the pot and cook for a few minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are soft.
6. Return the cooked meat to the pot and stir to combine.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients: canned tomatoes, tomato sauce, garlic, bay leaf, salt, pepper, cumin, dried basil, crushed oregano leaves, and chili powder.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for at least 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Note: Ensure all canned tomatoes are drained before adding them to the pot.
